section.heading: Authorization of appropriations; availability of land and water conservation fund money

content.p: There are authorized to be appropriated for the purposes of this subchapter not more than $47,802,000 for the acquisition of lands and interests in lands and not more than $26,241,000 for development. Money appropriated from the land and water conservation fund shall be available for the acquisition of lands, waters, and interests therein within the recreation area.

note.heading: Amendments
note.p: 1978—Pub. L. 95–625 increased land acquisition appropriations authorization to $47,802,000 from $19,802,000.
